creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
edwin       2007-09-24 21:36:23 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    multimedia           Makefile 
  Added files:
    multimedia/flv2mpeg4 Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
    multimedia/flv2mpeg4/files Makefile.bsd 
  Log:
  [new port] multimedia/flv2mpeg4: Fast and less lossy FLV to
  MPEG4(AVI/MOV/MP4/MP3/3GP) converter
  
          flv2mpeg4 allows you convert a Flash Video / FLV file
          (YouTube's videos,etc) to MPEG4 (AVI/MOV/MP4/MP3/3GP) file
          online. It is using a compressed domain transcoder technology
          (outline in Japanese). It converts FLV to MPEG4 faster and
          less lossy than a typical transcoder.
  
  PR:             ports/116446
  Submitted by:   Alex Kozlov <spam@rm-rf.kiev.ua>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.244     +1 -0      ports/multimedia/Makefile
  1.1       +42 -0     ports/multimedia/flv2mpeg4/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/multimedia/flv2mpeg4/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +13 -0     ports/multimedia/flv2mpeg4/files/Makefile.bsd (new)
  1.1       +4 -0      ports/multimedia/flv2mpeg4/pkg-descr (new)
